title: SipRefer ActionHook Payload
description: Payload sent to the sip-refer verb's actionHook when the REFER completes. Sent once the REFER response is received, or after a final NOTIFY arrives.

refer_status.description: SIP status code from the REFER response (e.g. 202 for accepted, 4xx/5xx for failure).

final_referred_call_status.description: Final SIP status of the referred call, extracted from a NOTIFY sipfrag. Present only when the REFER was accepted (202) and a final NOTIFY was received.
